title: John Swinney accused of putting UK's 'special relationship' with US in peril over use of Scottish airport for Iran war

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content: John Swinney accused of putting UK's 'special relationship' with US in peril over use of Scottish airport for Iran war. The SNP Leader is under pressure from the Scottish Greens to disclose the details around the use of Glasgow Prestwick Airport...

sourceReferences.citationText: serper-scottish-aviation – John Swinney accused of putting UK's 'special relationship' with US in peril over use of Scottish airport for Iran war
